headline: Shenzhen stocks plunge 2.4σ below 30-day mean; Beijing jabs Japan on remilitarization, unveils rail-tourism stimulus
headline_zh: 深成指异常下挫；中方斥日本再军事化，八大部门推铁路旅游刺激
narrative: The Shenzhen Component Index closed at 14,851.98, 2.4 standard deviations below its 30-day mean of 15,508.02, signalling severe market stress despite the SSE Composite's modest gain. The anomaly is likely driven by persistent liquidity tightness and regulatory uncertainty in the SME sector, though no direct policy trigger appeared today. Amid this, the regime maintained its assertive diplomatic posture: Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lin Jian accused Japan of 'tearing off its mask' on remilitarization, while also rolling out a joint ministerial plan to boost railway-tourism integration as a domestic demand lever. The disconnect between bourses and policy signals underscores the fragile confidence beneath the official narrative of recovery.
narrative_zh: 深证成指收报14851.98点，较30日均值15508.02低2.4个标准差，反映中小企业板块持续面临流动性紧缩与监管不确定性。同日，外交部发言人林剑指日本‘摘下面具’加速再军事化，同时八部门联合出台铁路旅游融合计划以刺激内需。股市与政策信号的背离凸显官方复苏叙事下的信心脆弱。

deviations.title: Shenzhen Component
deviations.note: Shenzhen Component at 14,851.98 is 2.4σ below its 30-day mean (15,508.02)

top_stories.primary_title: 于东来：胖东来员工不值这么多钱
top_stories.english_title: Yu Donglai says Pangdonglai staff don't deserve high pay
top_stories.why_it_matters: Signals a growing corporate pushback against wage expectations amid economic slowdown, risks fueling labor discontent.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 在经济放缓背景下，企业开始公开质疑高薪合理性，可能激化劳资矛盾。
top_stories.pull_quote: According to Baidu, Yu stated internally: 'Everyone actually doesn't deserve this much...'
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 据百度，于东来内部称：‘大家其实不值这么多钱...’

top_stories.primary_title: 让中华文明瑰宝永续留存、泽惠后人
top_stories.english_title: Xi Jinping emphasizes preservation of Chinese cultural heritage
top_stories.why_it_matters: Reinforces the Party's use of historical narrative for legitimacy, but adds no new policy signal.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 重申利用历史叙事增强政权合法性，无新政策信号。

top_stories.primary_title: 中方：日本已经摘下面具
top_stories.english_title: China says Japan has taken off its mask on remilitarization
top_stories.why_it_matters: Sharpens rhetoric ahead of possible defense policy coordination at upcoming multilateral forums, strains bilateral ties further.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 在多边论坛前夕升级对日批评，双边关系进一步紧张。
top_stories.pull_quote: "Japan, while shouting 'peace' and 'defense', is on a rampage toward remilitarization, substantially expanding military spending and relaxing export of lethal weapons."
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 日本嘴上喊着‘和平’‘防卫’，行动上却朝着‘再军事化’狂飙突进，持续大幅扩充军费，放宽杀伤性武器出口。

top_stories.primary_title: 2026年6月10日外交部发言人林剑主持例行记者会
top_stories.english_title: Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lin Jian holds regular press conference on June 10

top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 例行记者会，包含对日激烈批评，并可能涉及台湾、南海议题。

top_stories.primary_title: 旅游列车升级版来了 8部门促铁路与旅游融合发展
top_stories.english_title: Eight ministries promote railway-tourism integration with upgraded tourist trains
top_stories.why_it_matters: Part of a push to boost domestic service consumption and infrastructure utilization amid weak consumer spending.
top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 在消费疲软背景下，通过提升铁路旅游服务刺激内需并盘活基建。
top_stories.pull_quote: Joint document from 8 units including Ministry of Commerce, Ministry of Culture and Tourism, and China State Railway Group.
top_stories.pull_quote_zh: 商务部、文旅部、国铁集团等8单位联合发文。

top_stories.primary_title: 商务部 文化和旅游部 国铁集团等8单位印发《关于促进铁路与旅游融合发展 扩大服务消费的若干措施》的通知
top_stories.english_title: Eight departments issue measures to promote railway-tourism integration and expand service consumption

top_stories.why_it_matters_zh: 第6条的政策细节，可能包含补贴或监管松绑的具体措施。
